title: Synchronous git process spawning during array sorting (forensic scan)
description: In collectEntryPoints, the sort comparator calls readGitChurnWeight for compared elements, which runs execFileSync to spawn a synchronous git process. Sorting K elements is O(K log K) comparisons, so it can trigger hundreds of synchronous external process spawns, completely blocking the main event loop.
fix_direction: Pre-calculate git churn weights for all entry points once into a Map, then look them up O(1) in the comparator.

title: O(N * M) nested array intersection loop on recall path
description: On the recall path, candidate IDs and requested IDs are intersected with nested loops (effectiveIds.filter + requestedIds.includes), giving O(N*M) instead of O(N+M).
fix_direction: Convert candidateIds and requestedIds to Sets for O(1) membership, yielding O(N+M).

title: Sequential N+1 file reads on the hot path of MCP tool calls
description: ensureKnowledgeFresh (called on every MCP tool invocation after a 500ms cooldown) loops every knowledge markdown file and sequentially awaits processSingleFile (readFile + sha256). For larger KBs this is hundreds of sequential blocking I/O ops on the hot path.
fix_direction: Parallelize with Promise.all and check mtimeMs from stat to skip reading/hashing unchanged files.

title: Repeated loading/re-parsing of event ledger on every HTTP session call
description: JsonlEventStore.readEvents loads and parses the entire event ledger from disk on every lookup (get stream ID, replay events). As the ledger grows this causes linear degradation and repeated disk I/O on the streamable-HTTP hot path.
fix_direction: Add an in-memory cache of projected events in JsonlEventStore so the ledger file is not repeatedly read/parsed.

title: Blocking synchronous recursive directory walk on Express event loop
description: GET /api/scan calls walkFiles, a fully blocking synchronous recursive directory walk (readdirSync/statSync) on the Express event loop thread. For repos with thousands of files this hangs the HTTP server for seconds.
fix_direction: Refactor walkFiles to async fs promises (readdir/stat) or delegate the scan to a worker thread.

title: Redundant BM25 IDF log calculations per scored document
description: In buildBm25Model, the returned scoreDoc recomputes IDF of query terms on every invocation via idf(term) (Math.log). IDF depends only on static corpus stats, so re-computing Math.log per term per scored doc wastes CPU.
fix_direction: Pre-compute/cache IDF per term when building the model, or memoize idf inside scoreDoc.

title: Expensive synchronous recursive walk of all global stores in doctor checks
description: storeDoctorChecks loops all global stores calling findStoreExecutableViolations, a recursive synchronous directory scan (readdirSync/statSync checking stat.mode of every file), blocking the main thread with thousands of sync I/O ops for large KBs.
fix_direction: Make the walk asynchronous or cache scan results to avoid repeated synchronous I/O.
